name: ui_design_system
description: Generate or retrieve a consolidated UI/UX design system for a project. Combines a UI style (layout, typography, shape, motion rules) with a color palette (semantic tokens) and produces a complete design specification. Optionally persists the spec to design-system/MASTER.md and per-page override files. Use this tool before implementing any UI code to ensure consistent styling across the project.

style_id.description: ID of the UI style to use. Must match an 'id' field in skills/uiux/styles.json. Available styles: brutalist, glassmorphism, neobrutalism, editorial, minimal-zen, data-dense, soft-ui, retro-terminal, biomimetic, aurora-gradient. If omitted, a style is selected deterministically based on the project_name hash.

palette_id.description: ID of the color palette to use. Must match an 'id' field in skills/uiux/palettes.json. Available palettes: midnight-ink, chalk-board, neon-city, nordic-frost, terracotta-sun, deep-forest, sakura-bloom, volcanic-night, arctic-monochrome, ultraviolet. If omitted, selected deterministically based on the style and project_name.

stack.description: The front-end stack for which to generate implementation guidance. Affects which CSS/class/token format is used in the output.

page.description: Optional page name for a per-page override spec (e.g., 'landing', 'dashboard', 'checkout'). When provided along with persist=true, writes design-system/pages/<page>.md in addition to MASTER.md.

project_name.description: Name of the project. Used in the generated document header and for deterministic default selection when style_id/palette_id are omitted.

output_format.description: Format for the returned design system content.

persist.description: If true, write the generated design system to design-system/MASTER.md (always) and design-system/pages/<page>.md (when page is set). Files are created if missing; overwritten if they exist.
